title: Improved NEU locked slots
description: [1.8.9] Makes locked slots using the Not Enough Updates mod for Hypixel Skyblock look better.
body:
I thought the NEU slot locking icon was way too big and obscured the item itself, so I made this.

Before -> After</br>
